name: Selyodka Marinovannaya
recipeIngredient: 1 each Herring 2lb. scaled boned & cut into 1-inch diagonally cut pieces
1 each Carrot, large, scraped cut into 1/8-inch thick rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water, vinegar, and sugar to a boil.
2. Cook until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In two large Mason jars, layer the remaining ingredients.
5. Ensure that the spices are distributed evenly throughout the layers.
6. Pour the marinade evenly over the contents of each jar.
7. Screw the lids on tightly.
8. Place the jars in the refrigerator for 5-7 days.
